description: The system detects a suspicious login to a rider's account from a new device in a different country, followed by a trip request.

nodes.task_description: The system's fraud detection engine flags a suspicious login and immediately puts a temporary hold on the account.

expected_outcome.value: The account is frozen to prevent fraudulent activity.

nodes.task_description: An automated email and push notification are sent to the registered owner of the account, alerting them to the suspicious activity and prompting a password reset.
Any active trip requests from the suspicious session are automatically cancelled.
